assertions.title: Responsive on mobile

steps.observed: Homepage loads but page appears blank - no interactive elements detected

steps.expected: Missions view displayed with assertions panel accessible
steps.observed: Page shows no interactive elements after tab click

steps.expected: Mission detail with assertions panel visible
steps.observed: Mission expansion results in completely blank page with no elements

steps.expected: Assertions panel, validation controls, and run history accessible
steps.observed: No content visible; page does not render properly at 375px viewport
Page hangs on loading state and times out

evidence.network: Page loads but renders blank at mobile viewport - SPA navigation timeouts when interacting with missions

assertions.issues: At 375px mobile viewport: (1) Homepage appears to render blank with no interactive elements, (2) Missions tab click results in empty page, (3) Expanding mission details causes blank screen with no elements, (4) Scroll does not reveal assertions panel, validation controls, or run history - these components are not visible or accessible. The UI is not responsive at mobile viewport widths.

frictions.description: SPA navigation to mission detail pages causes browser to hang and timeout in headless browser mode
frictions.resolution: Attempted direct URL navigation and reloading - pages consistently hang or render blank

summary: Tested VAL-UI-011 (mobile responsive at 375px viewport): FAILED. At 375px mobile viewport, the assertions panel, validation controls, and run history are NOT visible or accessible. The homepage renders but appears blank (no interactive elements detected). The Missions tab results in an empty page. Expanding mission details causes a blank screen with no elements. No content is accessible even after scrolling. The UI is not properly responsive at mobile viewport widths.
